name: Madison by Lyzr — Agent Skills
description: Capabilities Madison's governed banking agents provide. Madison is deployed inside a bank's perimeter and provisioned per engagement; these skills describe what Madison does, not a public callable endpoint.

skills.name: commercial-banking-rm
skills.title: Commercial Banking (RM)
skills.description: Decision-ready client briefs, meeting capture, credit coordination, and portfolio-growth signals for relationship managers.

skills.name: compliant-marketing
skills.title: Compliant Marketing
skills.description: One-line brief to a compliant, launch-ready, multi-channel campaign on the bank's own data, with fair-lending guardrails and human approval on every regulated step.

skills.name: deal-intelligence
skills.title: Deal Intelligence
skills.description: Evidence-backed evaluation of companies, partners, and targets with permissioned deal memory; resolves to partner / invest / acquire / monitor / pass.

skills.name: dispute-resolution
skills.title: Dispute Resolution (Mortgage Servicing)
skills.description: Agentic investigation and drafting of RESPA-window servicing disputes; rulebook decides, model drafts, a person signs.

skills.name: hr
skills.title: HR
skills.description: The employee journey run end to end: intake and scoring, early phone screen, an HRMS-connected employee desk, and offboarding.

skills.name: risk-compliance
skills.title: Risk & Compliance
skills.description: Third-party risk, vendor-AI and model-risk governance, and generated, stress-tested vendor exit playbooks; on-prem and examiner-ready.
